name: Packaging Designer
description: Create, audit, and refine product packaging systems across structural concept, panel hierarchy, claims organization, shelf impact, thumbnail readability, unboxing, SKU architecture, print feasibility, and sustainability tradeoffs.
not_for: pure logo or identity work with no packaging application
engineering-only structural packaging specs requiring CAD or tooling drawings
legal or regulatory sign-off on claims, ingredients, or warnings
logistics-only shipping optimization with no packaging communication objective
typical_inputs: product category, format, and pack size
required claims, ingredients, instructions, or warnings
production, cost, sustainability, and fulfillment realities
